summary: Iteration 68: Frontend Bug Fix Verification Complete. All 7 test scenarios passed. Verified both critical bugs are fixed: (1) Logout consistency - all logout buttons now redirect to https://spetapp.com/login, (2) TAP and Table modules load correctly for teste@teste.com (no 'Module Not Available' error).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) All logout buttons use centralized handleFullLogout which calls POST /api/auth/logout, clears tokens, and redirects to spetapp.com/login. (2) TapPage and TablePage now properly unwrap the response envelope (res.data?.data || res.data) in checkModuleAccess. CEO dashboard has logout button with data-testid='logout-btn'.

Scenario 1: Pulse Module Access.details: Login as teste@teste.com → navigate to /venue/home → open Modules dropdown → click Pulse → Pulse entry page loads correctly (not blocked)

Scenario 2: TAP Module Access.details: Navigate to /tap → TAP page loads with categories (Beers, Cocktails, Spirits, etc.) - NOT showing 'Module Not Available'

Scenario 3: Table Module Access.details: Navigate to /table → Table page loads with 'Select a table' prompt - NOT showing 'Module Not Available'

Scenario 4: Kitchen/KDS Module Access.details: Navigate to /kitchen → Kitchen Display System loads with Pending/Preparing/Ready/Delivered columns

Scenario 5: Logout from VenueHome.details: Click logout button (data-testid='logout-btn') → redirects to https://spetapp.com/login (external Lovable app)

Scenario 6: CEO Dashboard + Logout.details: Login as garcia.rapha2@gmail.com → redirects to /ceo → CEO dashboard shows 'Executive Overview' with metrics (MRR, Net New MRR, Active Customers, Churn Rate, ARPU, LTV/CAC) → logout redirects to spetapp.com/login

Scenario 7: User Switching.details: Login as teste@teste.com → logout (goes to spetapp.com/login) → navigate back to Emergent login → login as garcia.rapha2@gmail.com → correctly redirects to /ceo

Additional: TAP page logout.details: Logout button on TAP page redirects to spetapp.com/login

Additional: Table page logout.details: Logout button on Table page redirects to spetapp.com/login

Bug 1 - Inconsistent Logout.verification: All logout buttons (VenueHome, TAP, Table, CEO) call centralized handleFullLogout → POST /api/auth/logout → clear tokens → redirect to spetapp.com/login

Bug 2 - TAP/Table Module Not Available.verification: TapPage.js and TablePage.js properly unwrap response envelope in checkModuleAccess using (res.data?.data || res.data). User teste@teste.com can access all 4 modules without 'Module Not Available' error

code_files_verified: frontend/src/pages/TapPage.js - checkModuleAccess envelope fix at line 150
frontend/src/pages/TablePage.js - checkModuleAccess envelope fix at line 158
frontend/src/pages/CeoPage.js - logout button added with data-testid='logout-btn'
